title: Services people in Chile often compare for a Netherlands move
intro: Apostille planning, translations, transfers, housing, and insurance—alongside MVV timing after IND approval, Santiago embassy steps, and long-haul relocation.

items.reason: Understand how Chilean apostille fits gemeente, IND, and employer document bundles.
Plan sworn translations when Dutch authorities need Dutch, English, French, or German text.
Map document categories before MVV or municipality submissions.
Turn your route into a phased checklist with ?from=chile context.
Sequence BSN, banking, and insurance in your first weeks after landing.
Move CLP and EUR with transparent pricing while you coordinate deposits and rent.
Digital Dutch banking often used soon after BSN and address.
Traditional Dutch banking option some employers and landlords recognise easily.
Short and mid-term listings while you search for a long-term rental in Amsterdam, Rotterdam, or beyond.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
Dutch SIM options after you land.
